title: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith}} {{Redlink}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Ep3VDcover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith:
The Visual Dictionary'' |author=[[James Luceno]]''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'' |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor=*[[Laura Gilbert]] *[[Jonathan W. Rinzler]] |publisher=[[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]] |release date=[[April 2]], [[2005]]{{DK|url=us/9780756611286-star-wars-revenge-of-the-sith-the-visual-dictionary|text=Star Wars Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary|oldversion=20151018025119}} |type= |pages=64 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=9780756611286 |series=''[[Star Wars Visual Dictionaries]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary''''' is a guide to [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] being the fourth book in [[Star Wars]] [[Star Wars Visual Dictionaries|The Visual Dictionary]] series. Written by [[James Luceno]] and published by [[Dorling Kindersley]]. Published on [[April 2]], [[2005]] along with the film novelizations and a number of other reference books, the book came out almost a month before the film, and as a result it introduced a number of elements from the movie prior to its release. It was republished as part of ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'' and was to be reissued with expanded content as [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Expanded Visual Dictionary|''Revenge of the Sith: The Expanded Visual Dictionary'']]. ==Publisher's summary== ''This invaluable Visual Dictionary brings DK's world-acclaimed visual style to the climactic final ''Star Wars'' prequel. High-quality annotated photographs and stills from the movie explain every important feature of the characters, creatures, costumes, droids and equipment.'' ''Author James Luceno worked in partnership with Lucasfilm, ILM and DK to research this unique reference book, gaining exclusive access to amazing photographic material and insider information. Key objects have been created specially by expert Consultants from ILM - including the first-ever view beneath General Grievous' head armor.'' ''The result is a unique and fascinating reference work that reveals the characters and creatures of ''Revenge of the Sith'' as they appear nowhere else!'' ==Contents== *[[Clone Wars/Legends|Galactic War]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] *[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] *[[Confederacy of Windu]] *Anakin—Fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] *Elite [[Cloning/Legends|Clones]] *Clone Specialists *[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone Troopers]] *Support Droids *[[Utapau/Legends|Utapauns]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]] *[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Weapons *[[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] *[[Separatist Council/Legends|Separatist Council]] *[[Kallidahin/Legends|Polis Massans]] *[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] ==Continuity== *A Separatist [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] used by Grievous is called a [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] escape pod. *The droid [[FX-6/Legends|FX-6]] is labeled FX-9. *[[Aruteous Gunnay|Rute Gunnay]] is called [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]. *[[Galle/Legends|Galle]] is [[Bly/Legends|Bly]]. *The unknown green [[Utapaun]] "law enforcement" vehicle that is incorrectly marked as a [[Mankvim-814 light interceptor/Legends|Mankvim-814 light interceptor]] is actually seen on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. *The height of the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] is mistakenly 1.78 meters instead of the regular 1.83 meters. *[[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170]] was said to have projectile cannon above the wing mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. *It states that [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]] defended the Jedi Temple and died in the purge - Allie was not on Coruscant at the time. She was patrolling on [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] and was killed during Order 66. *[[Jobal Naberrie/Legends|Jobal]] and [[Sola Naberrie/Legends|Sola Naberrie]] are incorrectly identified as Padmé's sister and mother, respectively. Their images, however, are labeled correctly. *Clone Jai'galaar is actually called Jag. *Either [[Aito Laff]] or [[Lushros Dofine/Legends|Lushros Dofine]] is incorrectly identified as [[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780756611286}}; [[April 2]], [[2005]];
